question: What is the difference between FOB and CIF price?
ground_truth: FOB (Free On Board) price covers manufacturing and loading costs. CIF (Cost, Insurance and Freight) includes additional shipping insurance and freight to the destination port, typically USD 1,000-2,000 more than FOB.
